papers.title: Potassium ferrioxalate

key_data.hazards: R20 (harmful by inhalation), R21, R22, R34, R36, R37, R38

findings.structure: Octahedral transition metal complex with three bidentate oxalate ions bound to Fe(III) center. K+ acts as counterion balancing the -3 charge.
findings.isomerism: Exhibits optical activity with two non-superimposable stereoisomers: Λ (left-handed screw axis) and Δ (right-handed screw axis).
findings.photoreduction: In solution, ferrioxalate complex is decomposed by light. Reaction: 2[Fe(C2O4)3]3- + hν → 2[Fe(C2O4)2]2- + C2O4 2- + 2CO2. Fe(III) reduced to Fe(II). Green solution turns orange in sunlight.
findings.synthesis_route_1: Fe2(SO4)3 + 3 BaC2O4 + 3 K2C2O4 → 2 K3[Fe(C2O4)3] + 3 BaSO4↓ (heat ~1.5 hr in water, filter BaSO4, cool to crystallize)

papers.title: Convenient procedure for the preparation of potassium trioxalatoferrate(III)

key_data.ligand_source: Oxalate (from oxalic acid or potassium oxalate)

findings.procedure: Reliable undergraduate preparation from Fe(II) ammonium sulfate via oxidation with H2O2 in the presence of oxalate. Good yields of well-formed green crystals suitable for further analysis.
findings.significance: Classic, most-cited synthesis procedure for undergraduate laboratories.

papers.title: Preparation and properties of potassium trioxalatoferrate(III) trihydrate

findings.properties_studied: Composition, behaviour on heating, characteristic photoreduction (photochemical decomposition to Fe(II) and CO2 on light exposure)
findings.significance: Illustrates photochemistry underlying use as chemical actinometer. Documents thermal behavior.

papers.title: Preparation and analysis of potassium tris(oxalato)ferrate(III) trihydrate: A general chemistry experiment

key_data.analysis_methods: Permanganate titration (oxalate), spectrophotometry (iron), gravimetric (water of hydration)

findings.procedure: Students prepare the complex then analyze for oxalate, iron, and water of hydration to determine empirical formula.
findings.significance: Combines synthesis, redox titration and spectrophotometric analysis in one laboratory sequence.

papers.title: Synthesis and Characterization of Potassium Tris(oxalato)ferrate(III) Trihydrate: A Spectrophotometric Method of Iron Analysis

key_data.analysis_methods: Chemical synthesis, photochemical experiment, spectrophotometric analysis

findings.procedure: Students synthesize and characterize via spectrophotometric Fe determination. Demonstrates complex stoichiometry and LMCT absorption of ferrioxalate ion.
findings.spectral_feature: Ligand-to-metal charge-transfer (LMCT) absorption characteristic of ferrioxalate ion.

papers.title: Simple Measurement of Magnetic Susceptibility with a Small Permanent Magnet and a Top-Loading Electronic Balance

key_data.equipment: Small permanent magnet + top-loading electronic balance
key_data.sample: K3[Fe(C2O4)3]·3H2O used as example paramagnetic complex

findings.significance: Allows undergraduates to estimate magnetic moments of paramagnetic complexes without dedicated magnetic balance.
findings.magnetic_moment_expected: Fe(III) d5 high-spin: 5 unpaired electrons, μeff ≈ 5.9 BM

papers.title: Potassium Tris(oxalato)ferrate(III): A Versatile Compound To Illustrate the Principles of Chemical Equilibria

key_data.method: Spectrophotometric monitoring of ligand exchange equilibria

findings.procedure: Stepwise dissociation/speciation of ferrioxalate complex followed spectrophotometrically. Students observe ligand exchange and estimate equilibrium constants.
findings.significance: Connects solution equilibria with coordination chemistry concepts. Demonstrates stepwise formation of Fe(III)-oxalate species.

papers.title: Preparation, Analysis, and Characterization of Some Transition-Metal Complexes: A Holistic Approach

key_data.methods: Titrimetry, UV-Vis spectroscopy, IR spectroscopy, magnetic susceptibility, conductivity

findings.significance: Holistic upper-level inorganic lab: synthesis + analysis + characterization suite. Comprehensive IR, UV-Vis, magnetic, and conductivity data collection.

papers.title: 三草酸合铁(III)酸钾的室温固相合成与晶体结构表征
papers.journal: 分子科学学报 (Journal of Molecular Science)

key_data.characterization: Elemental analysis, ICP, X-ray single crystal diffraction, IR spectroscopy, thermal analysis

findings.synthesis_type: Solid-state (固相合成) - no solvent, room temperature
findings.significance: Novel green synthesis route avoiding aqueous workup. High yield, simple procedure.

papers.title: 三草酸合铁(III)酸钾绿色合成与结构表征
papers.journal: 实验技术与管理 (Experimental Technology and Management)

key_data.starting_materials: 硫酸亚铁铵 (Mohr's salt) + 草酸钾 (K2C2O4) + H2O2 (oxidant)
key_data.characterization: Elemental analysis, IR spectroscopy, X-ray powder diffraction (XRD), thermogravimetric analysis (TGA)

findings.synthesis_features: Mild conditions, high yield, low pollution. Suitable for undergraduate teaching.
findings.characterization_complete: Full characterization suite: EA, IR, XRD, TGA. Confirms structure and thermal behavior.

papers.title: 复盐K3Fe(C2O4)3·3H2O的热分析研究
papers.journal: 武汉科技学院学报 (Journal of Wuhan Institute of Science and Technology)

findings.analysis: Systematic TG-DTA study of thermal decomposition under programmed heating. Determined temperature ranges for dehydration and oxalate decomposition steps.
findings.decomposition_mechanism: Discusses thermal decomposition mechanism of the complex.

papers.title: Cr(III), Fe(III), Al(III), Cu(II)草酸配合物热分析研究
papers.journal: 西北大学学报(自然科学版) (Journal of Northwest University, Natural Science)

key_data.compounds: Cr(III), Fe(III), Al(III), Cu(II) oxalate complexes compared

findings.analysis: Systematic comparison of thermal decomposition processes across different metal oxalate complexes. Compares thermal stability, identifies decomposition steps and mechanisms.
findings.significance: Provides comparative data for understanding relative stability of Fe(III) oxalate vs other metal oxalates.

papers.title: The Synthesis, Chemistry and Magnetic Properties of Potassium Trioxalatoferrate(III)

findings.significance: Comprehensive study covering synthesis, chemical properties, and magnetic characterization.
findings.expected_magnetic_data: Fe(III) d5 (high-spin octahedral): S = 5/2, n = 5 unpaired electrons, μeff (spin-only) = 5.92 BM

papers.title: 三草酸合铁酸钾的合成及磁化率的测定
papers.type: 磁化率测定实验 (Chinese magnetic susceptibility experiment)

key_data.methods: Chemical synthesis + 磁化率测定 (magnetic susceptibility measurement, likely Gouy method)

findings.significance: Chinese undergraduate experiment combining synthesis with magnetic susceptibility measurement. Typically uses Gouy balance or similar method.

papers.title: Magnetic Moment Measurement of a Complex: K3[Fe(C2O4)3]
papers.file: Fe/英文/！！JCE1967p0142 Magnetic Moment Measurement of a complexK3[Fe(C2)4)2].pdf

findings.significance: Early undergraduate experiment for magnetic moment measurement of K3[Fe(C2O4)3]. Establishes the magnetic measurement as a standard characterization technique in teaching labs.
findings.note: PDF only; full text not extracted

papers.title: Synthesis of Potassium tris(oxalato)ferrate (WPI Laboratory Manual)
papers.type: Laboratory procedure (full text extracted from MHT)

key_data.stoichiometry: FeCl3·6H2O (2 mmol) : H2C2O4 (6.5 mmol) : KOH (12 mmol)
key_data.purification: Recrystallization from 3 mL water, wash with 1 mL ice-cold water
key_data.characterization_methods: IR spectroscopy, UV-Visible spectroscopy, light response test

findings.procedure_detail: Heat oxalic acid + KOH in water until dissolved. Add FeCl3·6H2O to hot solution, swirl. Filter hot through Kimwipe-plugged pipet. Crystallize in ice bath in dark. Suction filter (DO NOT WASH WITH WATER). Recrystallize.
findings.light_response: Product shows photochemical response - explicitly tested.

papers.title: 大学化学综合实验: 三草酸合铁(III)酸钾的制备和结构表征
papers.journal: 化学教育(中英文) (Chinese Journal of Chemical Education)

key_data.methods: Chemical synthesis, X-ray diffraction, IR spectroscopy, redox titration

findings.procedure: Comprehensive experiment: preparation + redox titration for composition + IR spectroscopy + XRD for structure + photochemical property investigation.
findings.significance: Trains students in combined synthesis-analysis-characterization skills.

papers.title: All About Ferric Oxalate
papers.type: Technical article (full text extracted from MHT)

key_data.traditional_formula: Fe2(C2O4)3·5H2O (ill-defined compound per Dr. Michael Ware)
key_data.well_defined_salts: Ammonium ferric oxalate, sodium ferric oxalate, potassium ferric oxalate (double oxalates)
key_data.color_variation: Golden amber (low oxalic acid) → yellow (moderate) → fluorescent green (high oxalic acid)

findings.nature_of_ferric_oxalate: Ferric oxalate is ill-defined; may form polymers. Different precipitation rates produce differing solubilities from the same batch.
findings.free_oxalic_acid_test: Add 1 drop 10-20% AgNO3 to 2 mL ferric oxalate solution. White precipitate (Ag2C2O4) indicates free oxalic acid.
findings.ferrous_oxalate_test: Potassium ferricyanide test (unreliable with EDTA). Better: fog test (coat paper, develop without exposure -- gray tint = bad).
findings.dissolving_methods: Cold water with periodic stirring (12-24 hr), microwave (10 sec zaps), or hotplate stirrer at ~140°F.
findings.double_oxalate_recipes: Na ferric oxalate: 6.7g ferric oxalate + 5.9g sodium oxalate + 40mL water. Li ferric oxalate: 6.7g ferric oxalate + 4.4g lithium oxalate + 40mL water (higher contrast, sharper brown).
findings.ferric_oxalate_synthesis: 200g ferric ammonium sulfate in 300mL water + 100mL strong NH4OH → Fe(OH)3 gel precipitate. Wash gel, then react with oxalic acid.

papers.title: 三草酸合铁(III)酸钾的合成及结构组成测定
papers.journal: 安庆师范学院学报(自然科学版)

key_data.starting_materials: FeCl2 (ferrous chloride), NH4HCO3 (ammonium bicarbonate), H2C2O4 (oxalic acid), K2C2O4 (potassium oxalate), H2O2
key_data.methods: Chemical synthesis + chemical analysis for composition and structure

findings.significance: Provides feasible preparation and composition determination protocol for inorganic chemistry experimental teaching.

papers.title: 三草酸根合铁(III)酸钾结晶方法比较和光致还原性验证

crystallization_methods_compared: Evaporative concentration (closer to emerald green color, more stable composition)

findings.comparison: Ethanol method: faster crystallization. Evaporation method: more emerald green crystals, more stable product composition.
findings.factors_affecting_product: Temperature, concentration, reagent amounts all affect product properties, yield, and experimental phenomena.
findings.photoreduction: Simple experiment confirms photochemical reduction property of the product.

papers.title: 三草酸合铁酸钾改进制备及其光致还原性探究

key_data.problems_addressed: Low yield, small crystal size in traditional preparation
key_data.optimization_parameters: Reaction temperature, crystallization method, ethanol amount

findings.improvements: Optimized preparation conditions improved product yield and crystal quality. Designed simple experiment to explore photoreduction property.
findings.significance: Suitable for basic chemistry experimental teaching.

papers.title: 废铁屑制备三草酸合铁酸钾虚实结合的综合化学实验设计

key_data.methods: Virtual simulation + hands-on experiment, chemical synthesis, composition determination, structure characterization

findings.significance: Waste iron → K3[Fe(C2O4)3]·3H2O. Virtual-actual combined experiment. Green chemistry + curriculum ideology.

papers.title: 综合化学实验：三草酸合铁(III)酸钾的合成研究及其配阴离子电荷数的测定

key_data.methods: Chemical synthesis + ion exchange method for charge determination

findings.method: Uses ion exchange to determine the charge of the complex anion [Fe(C2O4)3]3-, confirming it is 3-.

papers.title: 复盐草酸合Fe(III)Cu(II)酸钾标准生成焓的测定
papers.journal: 武汉理工大学学报 (Journal of Wuhan University of Technology)

key_data.method: Dissolution-reaction calorimetry, Hess's law thermodynamic cycle

findings.significance: Determined standard molar formation enthalpy of the oxalate complex salt. Provides fundamental thermochemical data for oxalate complex systems.

papers.title: 草酸分子结构与性质的量子化学计算研究
papers.journal: 西北师范大学学报(自然科学版)

key_data.methods: MP2, B3LYP, HF at 6-311++G** level; NBO analysis

findings.significance: Quantum chemical study of oxalic acid molecular structure. Provides theoretical basis for understanding oxalate ligand geometry in complexes.

papers.title: 离子交换树脂的种类和性能
papers.file: Fe/中文/离子交换树脂的种类和性能.mht

findings.significance: Reference on ion exchange resin types and properties. Used in charge determination experiments for the ferrioxalate anion.

thermal_analysis_TGA_DTA.decomposition_steps: Dehydration step(s) followed by oxalate decomposition step(s)
source_papers: 复盐K3Fe(C2O4)3·3H2O的热分析研究 (Wuhan Textile Univ., 2003)
Cr(III),Fe(III),Al(III),Cu(II)草酸配合物热分析研究 (Northwest Univ., 2004)
thermal_analysis_TGA_DTA.note: Exact temperature ranges and activation energies not extracted (PDF files). Papers confirm multi-step decomposition: dehydration then oxalate ligand decomposition.

magnetic_properties.measurement_methods: Gouy method (traditional), simplified magnet+balance method (JCE 2002), Evans NMR method
source_papers: The Synthesis, Chemistry and Magnetic Properties (BenchChem)
三草酸合铁酸钾的合成及磁化率的测定 (CNKI)

IR_spectroscopy.key_features: Characteristic ν(C=O), ν(C-O), ν(Fe-O) bands. Oxalate coordination modes identifiable.
source_papers: Zhong_2017 (IR as part of characterization suite)
Zhong_2016 (IR as part of characterization suite)
Dai_2021 (IR as part of comprehensive experiment)
IR_spectroscopy.note: Exact IR peak positions not extracted from PDF files.

UV_Vis_spectroscopy.key_features: Ligand-to-metal charge-transfer (LMCT) bands characteristic of Fe(III)-oxalate. The ferrioxalate ion gives a characteristic green color.

photochemical_properties.observation: Green solution turns orange in sunlight (hours)
photochemical_properties.mechanism: LMCT excitation → Fe(III) photoreduction to Fe(II) + CO2 release

ion_exchange_charge_determination.method: Pass complex solution through cation exchange resin (H+ form), titrate eluted H+ to determine charge of complex anion.
source_papers: 王春燕 - 综合化学实验 (ion exchange charge determination)
武瑞芳 - 思政实验 (ion exchange charge determination)
草酸合铁酸钾的制备及其离子电荷的测定

method_1_johnson_1970.features: Most common undergraduate method, reliable, well-documented

method_2_basulfate_precipitation.features: Uses precipitation to drive reaction, filtration to remove BaSO4

method_3_wpi.route: FeCl3·6H2O + H2C2O4 + KOH (2:6.5:12 mmol ratio) in water
method_3_wpi.features: Direct combination, recrystallization from water, crystallization in dark on ice

method_4_solid_state_zhong.features: Green synthesis, no solvent, room temperature, high yield, simple

method_5_green_synthesis_zhong.features: Mild conditions, high yield, low pollution, suitable for teaching

method_6_waste_iron.route: 废铁屑 (waste iron scrap) as starting material
method_6_waste_iron.features: Green chemistry, waste resource utilization, virtual-actual combined

method_7_fecl2_route.features: Alternative route using FeCl2 as iron source

notable_gaps_and_contradictions.gap_exact_IR_peaks: Exact IR absorption frequencies (cm-1) for K3[Fe(C2O4)3]·3H2O were not extracted. Papers mention IR characterization but peak assignments are in PDF files only.
notable_gaps_and_contradictions.gap_exact_TGA_temperatures: Precise dehydration and decomposition onset temperatures not extracted. Papers confirm multi-step decomposition but exact values are in PDF files.
notable_gaps_and_contradictions.gap_XRD_pattern_peaks: Exact XRD peak positions (2θ values) and lattice parameters not extracted. Crystal system confirmed as monoclinic P2(1)/n.
notable_gaps_and_contradictions.gap_magnetic_susceptibility_values: Exact measured χg, χm, μeff values not extracted. Theoretical values are well-established (d5 high-spin: 5 unpaired electrons, μeff ~5.92 BM).
notable_gaps_and_contradictions.gap_UV_Vis_peak_wavelengths: LMCT bands mentioned but exact λmax values not extracted from PDFs.
notable_gaps_and_contradictions.contradiction_ferric_oxalate_stoichiomet: Bostick & Sullivan article notes ferric oxalate is 'ill-defined' (Dr. Michael Ware) and may polymerize, while the potassium salt K3[Fe(C2O4)3]·3H2O is well-defined. The simple ferric oxalate Fe2(C2O4)3·5H2O is traditional but not rigorously characterized.
notable_gaps_and_contradictions.contradiction_crystallization_method: Feng_2015 notes ethanol precipitation gives faster crystallization but evaporation gives more stable, better-colored product. This may explain yield/quality variations reported across different lab manuals.
